Package calendar.controller

Class GuiCalendarController

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.controller.GuiCalendarController
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Features
    public class GuiCalendarController
extends java.lang.Object
implements Features
    The controller implementation for GUI mode supporting Features.

      Constructor Description

      The Constructor for GuiCalendarController.

      To create a calendar for GUI.

      Create a new single event in the current calendar.

      Create a new recurring event series in the current calendar.

      Edit a property (name/timezone) of an existing calendar.

      Edit an existing single event in a specified calendar.

      Edit an event series in a specified calendar.

      Export the current calendar to a file.

      To get a collection of all existing calendar names.
      java.lang.String getCurrentCalendarName()
      Get the name of the currently active calendar.
      java.lang.String getCurrentCalendarTimezone()
      Get the timezone of the currently active calendar.

      Search for events across calendar that match the given keyword.

      The executioner of setting default calendar.

      Navigate to a specific month and year.
      void switchCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName)
      To switch to the designated calendar.
      void viewEventsOnDate​(java.time.LocalDate date)
      View all events on a specific date.

                           java.lang.String timeZone)

        To create a calendar for GUI.

        calendarName - the calendar name
        timeZone - the timezone of the calendar

      • createEvent

        public void createEvent​(EventContext context)
        Description copied from interface: Features
        Create a new single event in the current calendar.
        Specified by:
        createEvent in interface Features
        Parameters:
        context - the EventContext containing all event properties (subject, start/end time, description, location, status)

      • createEventSeries

        public void createEventSeries​(EventContext context,
                              java.lang.String weekdays,
                              int occurrences,
                              java.lang.String seriesEndDate)
        Description copied from interface: Features
        Create a new recurring event series in the current calendar.
        Specified by:
        createEventSeries in interface Features
        Parameters:
        context - the EventContext containing event properties for the series
        weekdays - a string specifying days to repeat
        occurrences - the number of times the event should occur
        seriesEndDate - the last date for the series

        Description copied from interface: Features
        To get a collection of all existing calendar names.

        getAllCalendarNames in interface Features
        Returns:
        the collection of all existing calendar names

      • editEvent

        public void editEvent​(java.lang.String subject,
                      java.lang.String startDateTime,
                      java.lang.String endDateTime,
                      EventContext newContext,
                      java.lang.String calendarName)
        Description copied from interface: Features
        Edit an existing single event in a specified calendar.
        Specified by:
        editEvent in interface Features
        Parameters:
        subject - the current subject/name to edit
        startDateTime - the current start date/time of the event
        endDateTime - the current end date/time of the event
        newContext - the EventContext containing new values for event properties
        calendarName - the name of the calendar containing the event

      • editCalendarProperty

        public void editCalendarProperty​(java.lang.String calendarName,
                                 java.lang.String propertyName,
                                 java.lang.String propertyValue)
        Description copied from interface: Features
        Edit a property (name/timezone) of an existing calendar.
        Specified by:
        editCalendarProperty in interface Features
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the calendar to edit
        propertyName - the property to edit ("name"/"timezone")
        propertyValue - the new value for the property

        Description copied from interface: Features
        Search for events across calendar that match the given keyword.
        Specified by:
        getEventsAcrossCalendar in interface Features
        Parameters:
        keyword - the search term to match
        Returns:
        a collection of EventDecorators containing matching events

      • editEventSeries

        public void editEventSeries​(java.lang.String subject,
                            java.lang.String startDateTime,
                            java.lang.String endDateTime,
                            EventContext newContext,
                            java.lang.String calendarName)
        Description copied from interface: Features
        Edit an event series in a specified calendar. Modify subject/startTime/endTime from the current events or modify description/location/status for the entire series.
        Specified by:
        editEventSeries in interface Features
        Parameters:
        subject - the current subject of an event
        startDateTime - the start date/time of the event occurrence to edit
        endDateTime - the end date/time of the event occurrence
        newContext - the EventContext containing new values for series properties
        calendarName - the name of the calendar containing the series
